configuration.title: Next Star Not Scoopable
configuration.description: Warns to refuel when arriving at a star with 3 or more jumps remaining and the next destination is not scoopable.
configuration.prompt: The pilot just arrived in |trigger.StarSystem|. Plotted route: |navroute.Route|. Scoopable star classes are O, B, A, F, G, K, M. Find |trigger.StarSystem| in the Route array, then starting from the entry immediately after it, count how many consecutive stars are NOT scoopable before the first scoopable one. If the count is 0 respond with {"announcement": ""}. If the count is 1 respond with {"announcement": "The next star is not scoopable, so gas up here."}. If the count is 2 or more respond with {"announcement": "The next [N] stars are not scoopable, so gas up here."} replacing [N] with the count.
